name: code1
synccode: <div>cdir=`pwd`</div><div>echo $1.drawio 1&gt;&amp;2</div><div>pfr $1.drawio drawio.ohm drawio.glue $cdir/support.js \</div><div>&nbsp; &nbsp; | pfr - styleexpander.ohm styleexpander.glue $cdir/support.js \</div><div>&nbsp; &nbsp; | pfr - attributeelider.ohm attributeelider.glue $cdir/support.js \</div><div>&nbsp; &nbsp; | pfr - emitFactbase.ohm emitFactbase.glue $cdir/support.js \</div><div>&nbsp; &nbsp; | sort&nbsp;<span>&gt;15.pl</span></div><div><span>echo baton &gt;/dev/fd/4</span></div>

name: code2
synccode: <p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><font face="menlo"><span style="font-size: 11px">read baton &lt;/dev/fd/3</span></font></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><font face="menlo"><span style="font-size: 11px">echo '@@ create facts' 1&gt;&amp;2</span></font></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><font face="menlo"><span style="font-size: 11px">cp fb.pl _1.pl</span></font></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><font face="menlo"><span style="font-size: 11px">## create rect fact for every vertex that is not an edge/ellipse/text</span></font></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><font face="menlo"><span style="font-size: 11px">## sequence.drawio file contains vertexes, and marks all edge and ellipse (and text)</span></font></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><font face="menlo"><span style="font-size: 11px">## but does not mark rectangles (the default)</span></font></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><font face="menlo"><span style="font-size: 11px">## this pass finds the defaults and creates explicit rect(...) facts</span></font></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><font face="menlo"><span style="font-size: 11px">swipl -q&nbsp;</span></font><span style="font-size: 11px ; font-family: &#34;menlo&#34;">-g 'consult(5).'&nbsp;</span><span style="font-size: 11px ; font-family: &#34;menlo&#34;">-g 'consult(rects).'&nbsp;</span><span style="font-size: 11px ; font-family: &#34;menlo&#34;">-g 'printRects.' -</span><span style="font-size: 11px ; font-family: &#34;menlo&#34;">g 'halt.'&nbsp;</span><span style="font-size: 11px ; font-family: &#34;menlo&#34;">&gt; 16.pl</span></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><font face="menlo"><span style="font-size: 11px">echo baton &gt;/dev/fd/4</span></font></p><div><br></div>

name: code3
synccode: <p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><font face="menlo"><span style="font-size: 11px">read baton &lt;/dev/fd/3</span></font></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><font face="menlo"><span style="font-size: 11px">cp fb.pl _11.pl</span></font></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><font face="menlo"><span style="font-size: 11px"># convert fb.pl to JSON form</span></font></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><font face="menlo"><span style="font-size: 11px">swipl -q </span></font><span style="font-size: 11px ; font-family: &#34;menlo&#34;">-g 'use_module(library(http/json))'&nbsp;</span><span style="font-size: 11px ; font-family: &#34;menlo&#34;">-g 'consult(fb).'&nbsp;</span><span style="font-size: 11px ; font-family: &#34;menlo&#34;">-g 'consult(component).'&nbsp;</span><span style="font-size: 11px ; font-family: &#34;menlo&#34;">-g 'consult(names).'&nbsp;</span><span style="font-size: 11px ; font-family: &#34;menlo&#34;">-g 'consult(fixup).'&nbsp;</span><span style="font-family: &#34;menlo&#34; ; font-size: 11px">-g 'consult(code).'&nbsp;</span><span style="font-size: 11px ; font-family: &#34;menlo&#34;">-g 'consult(jsoncomponent).'&nbsp;</span><font face="menlo"><span style="font-size: 11px">-g 'allc.'&nbsp;</span></font><font face="menlo"><span style="font-size: 11px">-g 'halt.'&nbsp;</span></font><span style="font-size: 11px ; font-family: &#34;menlo&#34;">&gt;_.json</span></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><font face="menlo"><span style="font-size: 11px">echo done &gt;/dev/fd/4</span></font></p>

name: code4
synccode: <p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; font-size: 11px ; line-height: normal"><span class="s1"><font>read baton &lt;/dev/fd/3</font></span></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; font-size: 11px ; line-height: normal"><span class="s1"><font>echo '@@ bounding boxes' 1&gt;&amp;2</font></span></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><font face="menlo"><span style="font-size: 11px">cp fb.pl _2.pl</span></font></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><span style="font-size: 11px">swipl -q&nbsp;</span><span style="font-size: 11px">-g 'consult(fb).' </span><span style="font-size: 11px">-g 'consult(boundingBoxes).' </span><span style="font-size: 11px">-g 'printBB.'&nbsp;&nbsp;</span><span style="font-size: 11px">-g 'halt.'&nbsp;</span><span style="font-size: 11px">| ./augment-fb.bash</span></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><span><font>echo baton &gt;/dev/fd/4</font></span><br></p>

name: code5
synccode: <p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><font face="menlo"><span style="font-size: 11px">read baton &lt;/dev/fd/3</span></font></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; font-size: 11px ; line-height: normal ; font-family: &#34;menlo&#34;"><span class="s1">echo '@@ all contains 1' 1&gt;&amp;1</span></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><font face="menlo"><span style="font-size: 11px">cp fb.pl _4.pl</span></font></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><span style="font-size: 11px ; font-family: &#34;menlo&#34;">swipl -q&nbsp;</span><span style="font-family: &#34;menlo&#34; ; font-size: 11px">-g 'consult(fb).'&nbsp;</span><span style="font-family: &#34;menlo&#34; ; font-size: 11px">-g 'consult(onSameDiagram).'&nbsp;</span><span style="font-size: 11px ; font-family: &#34;menlo&#34;">-g 'consult(contain1).' -</span><span style="font-size: 11px ; font-family: &#34;menlo&#34;">g 'allContains1.'&nbsp;</span><font face="menlo"><span style="font-size: 11px">-g 'halt.'&nbsp;</span></font><span style="font-size: 11px ; font-family: &#34;menlo&#34;">| ./augment-fb.bash&nbsp;</span></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><span style="font-size: 11px ; font-family: &#34;menlo&#34;">echo baton &gt;/dev/fd/4</span><br></p><div><br></div>

name: code6
synccode: <p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; font-size: 11px ; line-height: normal ; font-family: &#34;menlo&#34;"><span class="s1">read baton &lt;/dev/fd/3</span></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; font-size: 11px ; line-height: normal ; font-family: &#34;menlo&#34;">cat 15.pl 16.pl &gt;fb.pl</p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; font-size: 11px ; line-height: normal ; font-family: &#34;menlo&#34;">echo baton &gt;/dev/fd/4</p>

name: code7
synccode: <p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; font-size: 11px ; line-height: normal ; font-family: &#34;menlo&#34;"><span class="s1">read baton &lt;/dev/fd/3</span></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; font-size: 11px ; line-height: normal ; font-family: &#34;menlo&#34;"><span class="s1">echo '@@ make fb' 1&gt;&amp;1</span></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><span style="font-family: &#34;menlo&#34; ; font-size: 11px">echo baton &gt;/dev/fd/4</span><br></p>

name: code8
synccode: <p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; font-size: 11px ; line-height: normal ; font-family: &#34;menlo&#34;"><span class="s1">read baton &lt;/dev/fd/3</span></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; font-size: 11px ; line-height: normal ; font-family: &#34;menlo&#34;"><span class="s1">echo "baton=/$baton/" 1&gt;&amp;2</span></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; font-size: 11px ; line-height: normal ; font-family: &#34;menlo&#34;"><span class="s1">echo end 1&gt;&amp;2</span></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; font-size: 11px ; line-height: normal ; font-family: &#34;menlo&#34;"><span class="s1"># no output</span></p>

name: code9
synccode: <p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><font face="menlo"><span style="font-size: 11px">read baton &lt;/dev/fd/3</span></font></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; font-size: 11px ; line-height: normal ; font-family: &#34;menlo&#34;"><span class="s1">echo '@@ deep contains' 1&gt;&amp;1</span></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><font face="menlo"><span style="font-size: 11px">cp fb.pl _5.pl</span></font></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><font face="menlo"><span style="font-size: 11px">swipl -q&nbsp;</span></font><font face="menlo"><span style="font-size: 11px">-g 'consult(fb).'&nbsp;</span></font><font face="menlo"><span style="font-size: 11px">-g 'consult(onSameDiagram).'&nbsp;</span></font><font face="menlo"><span style="font-size: 11px">-g 'consult(contain2).'&nbsp;</span></font><font face="menlo"><span style="font-size: 11px">-g 'printAllDeepContains.' </span></font><font face="menlo"><span style="font-size: 11px">-g 'halt.' |</span></font><span style="font-family: &#34;menlo&#34; ; font-size: 11px">&nbsp;./augment-fb.bash&nbsp;</span></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><span style="font-family: &#34;menlo&#34; ; font-size: 11px">echo baton &gt;/dev/fd/4</span><br></p><div><br></div>

name: code10
synccode: <p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><font face="menlo"><span style="font-size: 11px">read baton &lt;/dev/fd/3</span></font></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; font-size: 11px ; line-height: normal ; font-family: &#34;menlo&#34;"><span class="s1">echo '@@ direct contains' 1&gt;&amp;1</span></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><span style="font-size: 11px ; font-family: &#34;menlo&#34;">cp fb.pl _5.pl</span><br></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><font face="menlo"><span style="font-size: 11px">swipl -q&nbsp;</span></font><span style="font-size: 11px ; font-family: &#34;menlo&#34;">-g 'consult(fb).'&nbsp;</span><span style="font-size: 11px ; font-family: &#34;menlo&#34;">-g 'consult(onSameDiagram).'&nbsp;</span><span style="font-size: 11px ; font-family: &#34;menlo&#34;">-g 'consult(contain3).'&nbsp;</span><span style="font-size: 11px ; font-family: &#34;menlo&#34;">-g 'printAllDirectContains.'&nbsp;</span><span style="font-size: 11px ; font-family: &#34;menlo&#34;">-g 'halt.'&nbsp;</span><span style="font-size: 11px ; font-family: &#34;menlo&#34;">| ./augment-fb.bash&nbsp;</span></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><span style="font-family: &#34;menlo&#34; ; font-size: 11px">echo baton &gt;/dev/fd/4</span><br></p><div><br></div>

name: code11

name: code15
synccode: <p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><font face="menlo"><span style="font-size: 11px">read baton &lt;/dev/fd/3</span></font></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><font face="menlo"><span style="font-size: 11px">cp fb.pl _10.pl</span></font></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><font face="menlo"><span style="font-size: 11px">swipl -q </span></font><span style="font-size: 11px ; font-family: &#34;menlo&#34;">-g 'consult(fb).'&nbsp;</span><span style="font-size: 11px ; font-family: &#34;menlo&#34;">-g 'consult(component).'&nbsp;</span><span style="font-size: 11px ; font-family: &#34;menlo&#34;">-g 'consult(code).'&nbsp;</span><span style="font-size: 11px ; font-family: &#34;menlo&#34;">-g 'printCode.'&nbsp;</span><span style="font-size: 11px ; font-family: &#34;menlo&#34;">-g 'halt.'&nbsp;</span><span style="font-size: 11px ; font-family: &#34;menlo&#34;">| ./augment-fb.bash&nbsp;</span></p><p class="p1" style="margin: 0px ; font-stretch: normal ; line-height: normal"><span style="font-family: &#34;menlo&#34; ; font-size: 11px">echo baton &gt;/dev/fd/4</span><br></p><div><br></div>
